questions.text: Which section of IPC defines Murder?
questions.explanation: Section 300 of the IPC defines 'Murder', while Section 299 defines 'Culpable Homicide' and Section 302 provides the punishment for murder.

questions.text: Common Intention is defined under which section?
questions.explanation: Section 34 deals with acts done by several persons in furtherance of common intention.

questions.text: Kidnapping from India is defined under Section ___?
questions.explanation: Section 360 defines 'Kidnapping from India', while 361 defines 'Kidnapping from lawful guardianship'.

questions.text: The Basic Structure Doctrine was established in which case?
questions.explanation: The 13-judge bench in Kesavananda Bharati Sripadagalvaru v. State of Kerala (1973) established this doctrine.

questions.text: Right to Privacy is a Fundamental Right under which Article?
questions.explanation: In Justice K.S. Puttaswamy v Union of India (2017), the SC declared Privacy as a part of Art 21.

questions.text: Which Article allows the Supreme Court to issue Writs?
questions.explanation: Article 32 is the 'Right to Constitutional Remedies' for the SC. Art 226 is for High Courts.
